name: Hosel Rockets Golf and Whiskey Lounge
about: Hosel Rockets Golf and Whiskey Lounge is an indoor golf simulator venue that combines state-of-the-art technology with a premium bar and dining experience. It features Trackman iO simulators providing a highly accurate golfing experience for practice and play, alongside a curated selection of premium whiskeys, bourbons, and craft cocktails. The venue offers an upscale, relaxed setting with a 29-foot wide video wall and gastro-pub inspired food, making it a destination for year-round golf and social gatherings. It caters to both serious golfers looking to improve their game and those seeking a unique leisure activity, with convenient booking through its online platform.
why_golfers_like_it: Trackman iO simulators provide immersive and highly accurate golfing experience with cutting-edge radar technology
Wide selection of world-renowned courses and practice modes for skill refinement and play
Premium whiskey selection and elevated gastro-pub food in an upscale, relaxed atmosphere

food_and_drink.notes: Elevated gastro-pub inspired menu available on-site
Curated selection of premium whiskeys, bourbons, local Michigan whiskeys, and specialty cocktails

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art radar technology for highly accurate shot tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't explicitly state whether club rentals are available, but it's recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue offers an elevated gastro-pub inspired menu and a curated whiskey selection on-site, with no mention of outside food or drinks being allowed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify the duration for 18 holes, but typical simulator rounds take 1.5-2 hours depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is Hosel Rockets kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, the venue features a whiskey bar and upscale atmosphere focused on adult golf and dining experiences, making it unsuitable for children.
